session.user: Run `make lint ty` from /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the complete output including exit codes. Do NOT fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make lint ty` command from the specified directory and report the complete output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint ty to check linting and type checking

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
**Report:**
Both tools passed successfully:
1. **ruff check**: All checks passed! 2. **ty check**: All checks passed!
**Exit Code**: 0 (success)
The `make lint ty` command completed without any linting violations or type checking errors.
